raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Move person to fresh air immediately.
STEP 2: Keep person resting.
STEP 3: Seek medical attention if symptoms persist or develop.
DO NOT: Do not remain in the contaminated area.
ESCALATE: Seek medical attention.

immediate_steps: Move person to fresh air immediately.
Seek medical attention if symptoms persist or develop.
do_not_do: Do not remain in the contaminated area.
